products.name: Miele di manuka
pros: Naturally sourced from New Zealand ensuring authenticity

trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo’s 2025‑05‑21 review highlights Miele di manuka’s antimicrobial properties, therapeutic use, and authentic New Zealand origin. The evidence is older than 60 days.
